description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a flat roof and a mix of glass and solid wall sections. The front area includes a driveway with two parked cars and a small landscaped section with shrubs. The backyard is equipped with a water tank and a row of trees along the perimeter, providing privacy and greenery. Large windows and sliding glass doors are prominent, especially on the side facing the backyard, allowing for ample natural light. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open plan and transparent sections, with outdoor seating and patio areas. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, wood, and metal, giving the bungalow a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a driveway, water tank, and landscaped areas. The design emphasizes open spaces, glass facades, and contemporary materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, main entrance, and a row of trees along the left fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the extensive glass facade facing the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, water tank, and the open-plan layout with visible rooms and patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance, water tank, and the rear garden with trees along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
